_note: Reach — v0.26 (LO ask, 2026-07-10): the supporters roll served to the dashboard's Supporters card. Edit this file to add / remove / re-tier community backers, then ship a release — the card picks it up automatically. Tier keys are display-only; supported values are 'gold', 'silver', 'bronze', 'community' (default). 'name' is required; 'note' is optional and shown as a subtitle chip.
